items.title: Electricity bills targeted in planned shakeup to energy pricing
items.summary: The war in the Middle East has brought renewed attention to Britain's vulnerability to energy price shocks.

items.title: Major Terror Plot Uncovered In Delhi, Men Working For ISI Proxy Arrested: Cops
